steps.title: Spot what the question asks
steps.content: The question requires a choice that “emphasizes” similarity. The key signal is language that directly highlights what the two works share, not what differs.

steps.title: Match the signal
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes similarity by using “both” to identify acrylic as a shared medium. Choices B, C, and D each fail the requirement—B simply lists dates, C uses “while” to highlight that one work has paper collage and the other doesn't, and D notes a size difference. That matches choice A — A is correct.
